# MotiveFX Android assets

Place store-ready artwork here before Play Store submission:

| File | Size | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| `icon.png` | 1024×1024 | Expo / Play icon source |
| `adaptive-icon.png` | 1024×1024 | Android adaptive foreground |
| `splash-icon.png` | 200–400px wide | Splash screen logo |

**Dev scaffold:** minimal placeholder PNGs are generated by `scripts/generate-mobile-assets.mjs`.

Replace placeholders with the premium MotiveFX wordmark / module gradient icon before public launch.
